_comment: iOS test app — Phase C asset manifest. Paths are relative to the engine `assets/` directory; the CMake helper sama_ios_bundle_assets_from_manifest reads this file at configure time and forwards the union of `common` + every tier list to sama_ios_bundle_assets(). Per Phase C, all tiers are bundled into one .app — per-tier IPA splitting is Phase D's job.
name: Sama iOS Test
